name: paddock
description: Project-first launchpad built on herdctl. Server-hosted, persistent Claude Code sessions organized by project.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/web
scripts.changeset:version: changeset version && node scripts/sync-root-version.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only
